race.description: Gold Coast Bowls & Community Club Hcp (Bm65)
race.comment: Tough. NEW HAMPSHIRE (1) was beaten a whisker at the Sunshine Coast before spelling and did a good job first-up, beaten 1L in stronger at Ipswich. Has placed 5/6 second up and the longer sprint suits. He's well overdue and gets his chance to break back. NATIONAL INTEREST (5) settled towards the tail first-up, before winding up strongly to score by 0.8 lengths over 1200m at Ipswich. Rates highly and is proven 2x second-up. A decent chance to go back-to-back. SHORTCUT (13) resumes for the sharp Matt Dunn yard and brings strong metro form. Has placed 2/2 first-up and will be naturally improved. Has a handy 2kg claim but will need some luck from the wide gate. TORONESS (10) won at Toowoomba two starts ago but was below her best there at a more recent appearance, finishing fifth over 1200m at Toowoomba. Has trialled since, and fitter again can't be ruled out. SPIRIT OF BRODIE (4) comes back to turf and will be fitter. Has a low gate and will be around the mark.
